description: This customizable template is the perfect way to generate enthusiasm and celebrate World Emoji Day with a custom design in an App. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
